---
description: "Use when drafting or refining the QA or testing analysis document for the UM Hackathon submission."
name: "Draft QATD"
argument-hint: "Describe the feature area, services, or tests to cover"
agent: "agent"
---

Draft or refine the QATD for this repository.

Include:

- scope and requirement traceability
- a 5x5 risk matrix
- environments and execution strategy
- CI quality gates
- happy-path, negative, and non-functional tests
- AI-output validation with acceptance criteria
- pass/fail thresholds and residual risks

Ground every claim in the current repository state where possible.
